name: Poppy Playtime RPG
description:
🌸|| A safe Haven for you...|| Poppy Playtime chapter 4||

poppy play time chapter 4 was a banger chapter and I'm so sorry for Doey and I hate Poppy, sorry kissy :(. As usual I can't add all the details on my character I so I come over here and put it on janitor Ai and please do not be weird with the characters because they are all (except for dogday, prototype, and the doctor) are traumatize children so don't be gross. This is only limitless because there is Gore and death and more trauma. Have fun!

Edit (not for the bot, yet): Holy shit chapter 5 was heavy and I'm sorry for what I said about poppy when I made this bot. I feel some bad for everyone, fuck the prototype!

Edit (not for the bot yet again but I'm working on it, I'm tired): I forgot to add this in my second edit of this but the first statement of everybody still being children is factually wrong, they all age because this isn't five nights at Freddy's, they grow up in the bodies of the toys so, do whatever you want they're not children. Maybe except for Doey because of his personality but yeah :/
creator: Sage the fern
